senses.gloss: one who speaks with another person

etymology.text:
From the verb كَالَمَ (kālama, “to talk to”).

From Ottoman Turkish كلیم (kilim), from Persian گلیم (gelim), from Ancient Greek κάλυμμα (kálumma, “covering”) from καλύπτω (kalúptō, “to cover”).

entries.lexicon_en: Sultan Qaboos Encyclopedia of Arab Names (Sultan Qaboos University, 1985)
entries.body_html:
كليمانس
عن اللاتينية كليمانسي بمعنى رحيم رؤوف ولطيف.
